gallery.title: Poster art concept
gallery.alt: Poster artwork for Open Mic Odyssey with bold title treatment.
gallery.description: A poster-led asset for submissions, one-sheets, and first-look announcements.

gallery.title: Roadside still
gallery.alt: Comics paused during a cross-country stop at a Tesla Supercharger.
gallery.description: A wide still that emphasizes travel, fatigue, and the in-between texture of the documentary.

gallery.title: Green room pre-show
gallery.alt: Backstage moment before a stand-up set in a small venue.
gallery.description: A behind-the-scenes frame suited for press kits, social assets, and team updates.

gallery.title: Late-night drive frame
gallery.alt: Night highway view from inside the tour vehicle.
gallery.description: Road footage that communicates movement, distance, and the emotional cost of staying in motion.

gallery.title: Stage light portrait
gallery.alt: Performer in Furry costume hit by green light during a club set.
gallery.description: A character-forward image for bios, speaking invitations, and program art.

gallery.title: Crew on location
gallery.alt: A man standing on a rock while a man in a yellow safety vest sets up a shot at an outdoor stop in the Bonneville salt flats.
gallery.description: A production-side image that helps the gallery feel like more than a poster dump.
